title: Review Audit Plan: FA4 B200 White-Box Runtime Predictor
summary: Skeptical audit plan for the FlashAttention-4 B200 white-box runtime predictor draft, identifying the strongest and weakest evidence, likely rejection reasons, and the preferred revise route.

claims_audited: TMA/L2 effective bandwidth is the dominant improvement (5.76% MAPE alone)
Occupancy and precision terms refine the combined model
Correction factors are bounded, interpretable, and calibrated from data
weakest_evidence: Claim that six factors are calibrated in the combined model; code/artifact show only four are calibrated
likely_rejection_reasons: Calibration-factor misstatement between text and artifact/code
Unresolved citation placeholders and sparse reference list
sections.experiment_inventory: No new experiment is required; all metrics already exist.
